creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
I merged xview-config and xview-lib by following the exact procedure 
suggested by SUN, and added several fixes, it even install the 
documentation now.
I will submit a new xview-clients, with the proper dependencies and
fixes to complement this.

How-To-Repeat: Obviously, this superceeds PRs 9656 and 9655
